title: Finding H. pylori in the Fine Print: Evidence-Linked Multi-Agent Case Finding from Gastric Biopsy Reports

title: RuBench: A Repository-Level Agentic Coding Benchmark with Natively Authored Russian Task Specifications
summary: Developers increasingly delegate real maintenance work to product-grade coding agents, and many state tasks in their native language, in the style of a customer request rather than a curated English issue. title: From Sinhala to Dhivehi: Cross-Lingual Transfer Learning for Low-Resource Speech Recognition
summary: Dhivehi, the national language of the Maldives, is currently under-resourced for automatic speech recognition (ASR) and other NLP tasks. summary: Is word acquisition in children uneven with respect to semantic and lexical categories?
